how_far: Cleared the game: 15/15 wins on the 15 practice seeds (mean win ~35k steps / ~580s) and 52/60 on 60 unseen test seeds (~87%); fastest clear 171s (10247 steps) with 100% of all boss HP destroyed in every win.
failure_modes: ~13% of unseen-seed runs still die, mostly to void/voidCore teleport-slams (3000 dmg one-shot) when caught mid-field or inside the static-bullet lattice trap
chip-deaths when cornered at the bottom rail by spray barrages during long weak-build first-boss fights
lessons: movement: receding-horizon space-time value iteration over predicted hazards (replanned every tick) beats greedy potential fields; conservative reach (24px/tick vs the 40 cap) buys slack for newly spawned bullets
no i-frames: every bullet (300-450) and body contact (900-3000) lands; the bottom rail and corners are death traps under barrages
guns fire straight up: win speed = alignment uptime below the boss; hunt from below whenever there is room, pick the firing lane with fewest add bodies (without pierce, adds absorb every shot)

the 5-stream bullet fan converges within ~250px, so hover close to safe bosses (azure/crimson) but keep 340+px from teleport-slammers (void/voidCore); unknown variants get cautious first contact, then adaptive trust
boss gauntlet length (1 vs 3 bosses) is an uncontrollable RNG draw at boss death - optimize kill speed for both branches
upgrade order: exp multipliers in the first picks snowball levels; pierce > 5-way split > fire rate > boss damage; magnet upgrades give safe passive exp; one shield = slam insurance
tuning beyond a validated local optimum is dominated by trajectory-chaos noise: every later point-fix (corner aversion, flee timers, wall clamps) tested worse on 45-90 run batches and was reverted
